attributes.action: More help and support for SEN children & parents
attributes.additional_details:
I have just pulled my son out of mainstream school he is nearly 14 he has adhd and is on the autism pathway. He has been failed immensely by his school and has been made to feel he is crazy and worthless! He has been penalised because of his disability! This should NOT be happening ! How are these schools getting away with this?
I don’t just speak on behalf of my son I speak on behalf of every  SEN child and their families. Every child and their families. 

Every child has a right to an education!
attributes.background: Offer mainstream schools more help and support to understand SEN children. To help each individual child with their individual needs and not penalise them for having different needs or a disability.School should be a safe place where children grown not be failed!

rejection.details:
I'm afraid this petition is unclear about exactly what you want the Government to do that it is not already doing (or says it's doing).  

We do have some petitions already open on SEND issues which you may want to look at and possibly sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750793 - Provide more funding for children with SEN in schools

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746871 - Provide funding for all schools to have a full time dedicated SENDCo

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746351 - Mandate all teachers in mainstream schools receive SEN & mental health training
